summary: Phase 1 Stabilization Testing Complete - Iteration 149. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 8 critical fixes: login privacy, market settings, service forms→requests, contact form, business pricing, quote categories, African phone prefixes, and success states with activation banners.
seed_data_creation: Created test requests via API during testing (contact_general, service_quote, business_pricing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 149 tested Phase 1 Stabilization pack. All 8 critical fixes verified: 1) Login privacy - /api/auth/me validates tokens correctly (401 without token, 200 with valid token). 2) Market settings - GET /api/market-settings returns phone='+255 759 110 453', email='sales@konekt.co.tz', currency='TZS'. 3) Service forms→Requests - POST /api/public-requests with service_quote/business_pricing works. 4) Contact form - POST /api/public-requests/contact creates contact_general with account_invite. 5) Quote categories - Office Equipment and Promotional Materials in dropdown. 6) African phone prefixes - 55 countries with TZ +255 format. 7) Success states - Contact and quote forms show reference number + activation banner. 8) Footer fixed to use market settings. All regression tests pass: guest checkout, margin 20%, all 4 role logins, CTAs, admin requests.

LOGIN_PRIVACY_valid_token_returns_user.details: GET /api/auth/me with valid admin token returns user with role

SERVICE_FORM_service_quote.details: POST /api/public-requests with request_type=service_quote creates request with request_number

CONTACT_FORM_creates_request.details: POST /api/public-requests/contact creates contact_general request with request_number and account_invite

AFRICAN_PHONE_PREFIXES_count.details: 55 African countries in phone prefix dropdown

SUCCESS_STATE_contact.details: Contact form shows success with reference number + activation banner with 'Activate Account' button

SUCCESS_STATE_quote.details: Quote form shows success with reference number + activation banner with 'Activate Account' button

FRONTEND_business_accounts_card.details: Business Accounts card has light background with dark readable text

FRONTEND_footer_phone.details: Footer shows +255 759 110 453 (fixed Footer.js to use useMarketSettings)

FRONTEND_login_page.details: Login page loads correctly without auto-redirect

fixes_applied.issue: Hardcoded phone '+255 XXX XXX XXX' and email 'hello@konekt.co.tz'
fixes_applied.fix: Updated to use useMarketSettings() hook for dynamic phone, email, and address

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
